heroSubtitle: Expert visa consultancy services to help you navigate the complexities of international travel and secure your dream visa.
faqSubtitle: Here are some frequently asked questions that may help you learn more about us and our services.

items.question: What types of visas do you offer consultancy for?
items.answer: We offer consultancy for a wide range of visas, including tourist visas, work visas, student visas, and family reunification visas.

items.question: How can I start the consultancy process?
items.answer: You can start the process by filling out the contact form on our website or by reaching out to us directly via phone or email.

items.question: What is the cost of the consultancy service?
items.answer: The cost varies depending on the type of visa and the complexity of the case. Please contact us for a tailored quote.

items.question: How long does the visa application process take?
items.answer: The duration depends on the type of visa and the country you are applying to. We will provide you with a more accurate time estimate based on your individual case.

items.name: Yara
items.text: I am happy to deal with Masar Company. They were quick to complete the task and their prices are reasonable. They explain the details and prepare well for the interview at the embassy.

items.name: Salma
items.text: I advise people who intend to travel to Germany to contact them, as they are experts in visa applications, requirements, and preparing the necessary documents.

items.name: Mohammad
items.text: My friends at Masar Company are incredibly helpful in overcoming obstacles. Even after arriving in Germany, I'm still in contact with them for assistance in finding accommodation and completing paperwork.

seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Masar Center Privacy Policy in accordance with the GDPR.

section1.title: 1. Data Protection at a Glance
section1.generalInfoText1: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.
section1.generalInfoText2: Personal data refers to any information that can be used to identify you personally, such as name, email address, phone number, or official documents.
section1.generalInfoText3: Detailed information on data protection can be found in the sections below.
section1.dataControllerQuestion: Who is responsible for data collection?
section1.dataControllerAnswer: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. Contact details can be found in the section “Responsible Entity”.
section1.dataCollectionQuestion: How do we collect your data?
section1.dataCollectionList1: Data you provide directly, for example via contact forms or service requests
section1.dataCollectionList2: Technical data collected automatically when you visit the website (e.g. browser type, operating system, time of access, IP address)
section1.dataUsageQuestion: Why do we use your data?
section1.dataUsageList1: To ensure proper operation of the website
section1.dataUsageList2: To process inquiries and communicate with you
section1.dataUsageList3: To provide services related to visas, employment, accommodation, and courses
section1.dataUsageList4: To analyze and improve website performance
section1.rightsIntro: You have the right at any time to:
section1.rightsList2: Request correction or deletion of your data
section1.rightsList4: Withdraw your consent at any time
section1.rightsList5: Lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority
section1.rightsOutro: You may contact us at any time with questions regarding data protection.

section2.title: 2. General Information and Mandatory Disclosures
section2.dataProtectionText1: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously and treat it confidentially in accordance with applicable data protection laws, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
section2.dataProtectionText2: Please note that data transmission over the Internet (e.g. email communication) may have security vulnerabilities and complete protection against third-party access cannot be guaranteed.
section2.controllerExplanation: The responsible entity is the natural or legal person that determines the purposes and means of processing personal data.
section2.legalBasisIntro: Personal data is processed in accordance with Article 6 GDPR on the following legal bases:
section2.legalBasisList2: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR – Performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures
section2.storageDurationText1: We store personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected.
section2.storageDurationText2: Data will be deleted once the purpose no longer applies or upon your request for deletion, unless statutory retention obligations require longer storage.
section2.withdrawConsentText1: You may withdraw your consent to the processing of your personal data at any time.
section2.withdrawConsentText2: The withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out prior to the withdrawal.
section2.withdrawConsentText3: Consent may be withdrawn informally by contacting us using the details provided above.
section2.dataTransferTitle: Transfer of Data to Third Countries
section2.dataTransferText1: Personal data may be transferred to countries outside the European Union (third countries) when using external services such as Google or WhatsApp.
section2.dataTransferText2: Such transfers are carried out exclusively on the basis of Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission.

section3.title: 3. Data Collection on This Website
section3.cookiesText1: This website uses cookies to ensure proper functionality and to improve the user experience.
section3.cookiesText2: Analytical cookies are only used after your explicit consent.
section3.cookiesText3: You can disable cookies at any time via your browser settings.
section3.contactFormText: If you submit inquiries via the contact form, the information you provide will be stored for the purpose of processing your request and for follow-up questions. This data will not be shared with third parties without your consent.
section3.emailPhoneText: If you contact us by email or phone, the data you provide will be used solely to process your inquiry.
section3.whatsappText1: We use WhatsApp Business for communication if you voluntarily choose this channel.
section3.whatsappText2: Personal data may be processed by Meta Platforms.
section3.whatsappText3: Using WhatsApp is optional and you may choose alternative communication methods at any time.

section4.title: 4. Social Media
section4.text: This website may contain elements or links to social media platforms. When activating such elements, data may be transmitted to the respective providers in accordance with their privacy policies.

section5.title: 5. Analytics and Advertising Tools
section5.gtmText: Google Tag Manager is used to manage website tags and does not store personal data itself.
section5.gaText1: This website uses Google Analytics to analyze user behavior. In doing so:
section5.gaList2: Processing occurs only after user consent
section5.gaList3: Data is used exclusively for statistical purposes

section6.title: 6. Data Security
section6.textIntro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against:

section7.title: 7. Supervisory Authority
section7.text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority:
section7.authorityName: State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information North Rhine-Westphalia (LDI NRW)

section8.title: 8. Disclaimer
section8.textIntro: We provide advisory and support services only in the areas of visas, employment, accommodation, and courses. We do not guarantee:

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.idNr: VAT Identification Number according to § 27a German VAT Act:
impressum.responsible: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 para. 2 MStV:

seo.title: Legal Notice
seo.description: Official legal notice of Masar UG including company details, managing director, commercial register and contact information in accordance with German law.

impressum.disclaimerText:
Masar UG offers consulting and support services regarding visa and study preparation. We do not represent governmental authorities and do not guarantee the issuance of any visa.

All applications must be submitted by the client directly to the responsible authorities. Final decisions remain solely with the competent governmental institutions.

The offered language courses are not officially accredited and do not result in a formally recognized language qualification.

Liability for decisions of authorities or individual outcomes is excluded to the extent permitted by law.

servicesAndVisa.title: Services Section – Visa Types
servicesAndVisa.subtitle: We provide you with knowledge, experience, and correct guidance…

doctorsVisa.title: Medical Visa
doctorsVisa.subtitle:
We offer consulting and services for medical professionals wishing to apply for a medical visa to Germany.
We accompany you to understand the requirements, prepare your application correctly, and prepare you for the consulate interview.
doctorsVisa.list1: Evaluation of your professional and academic status and identification of the most suitable path for you
doctorsVisa.list2: Assistance in preparing and filling out the required documents
doctorsVisa.list3: Guidance on credential recognition and related procedures
doctorsVisa.list4: Preparation for the consulate interview in a realistic manner
doctorsVisa.list5: Clarification of common reasons for approval or rejection based on our extensive experience

jobSearcherVisa.title: Job Search Visa-Chancenkarte
jobSearcherVisa.subtitle:
The Job Search Visa or Chancenkarte is a chance for qualified individuals to enter Germany and search for a job legally.
We help you understand this new system and determine if it is suitable for your current situation.
jobSearcherVisa.list1: Evaluation of your points according to the Chancenkarten-System
jobSearcherVisa.list2: Introduction to the conditions and requirements in simple language
jobSearcherVisa.list3: Preparation of the application and the required documents
jobSearcherVisa.list5: Guidance on opening a bank account and booking temporary accommodation

studyVisa.title: Study Visa (Bachelor – Master)
studyVisa.subtitle: We assist students who wish to study in Germany in choosing the most suitable academic path according to their qualifications and opportunities.
studyVisa.list1: Counseling for selecting the appropriate major and university
studyVisa.list2: Assistance in obtaining university acceptance letters
studyVisa.list3: Preparation of the visa application and document filling
studyVisa.list4: Explanation of requirements for the closed bank account
studyVisa.list5: Guidance on applying with a spouse or child if applicable

aboutUs.title: Masar.. Your Trusted Guide Towards Your Future in Germany
aboutUs.description: A registered German company offering consulting services for German visas for students and job seekers, and practical support for those wishing to travel to Germany.
aboutUs.vision: Masar UG (haftungsbeschränkt) was established in the heart of North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, to be the official and trusted gateway for students, researchers, and job seekers from the Middle East, especially from Syria, Iraq, and Jordan, who wish to start their academic or professional journey in Germany.
aboutUs.whoWeAre:
Who is behind "Masar"?
We are a team of specialists based in Germany, united by a deep understanding of the German educational and professional landscape and a thorough awareness of the challenges faced by young people in our Arab countries when considering migration or study. Under the leadership of founders Morhaf Esmail and Rami Ismaeel, "Masar" was launched to put our field experience and legal expertise at your disposal.
aboutUs.whatMakesUsDifferent:
What makes us different?
We are not just a service office; we are a registered German company (HRB 39995) committed to the highest standards of transparency and legality. We believe that knowledge is the key to success; therefore, we do not make false promises but empower you through:

Smart Guidance: We teach you how procedures work so you can apply with confidence.

Logistical Support: From opening bank accounts remotely to assisting with housing arrangements and preparing consulate documents.

Absolute Transparency: We are your partners in preparation and planning, presenting facts as they are without exaggeration to ensure results, respecting German laws and valuing your trust.
aboutUs.ourMission:
Our Mission
At "Masar", we understand that behind every visa application lies a great ambition and a family waiting for their child's success. Therefore, we treat each file with complete privacy and high professionalism, fully committed to European data protection laws (GDPR), ensuring you have a safe and organized journey from your home country to stability in Germany.

Your partners from start to finish.
Masar UG – Your Safe Gateway to Germany.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. You can choose which categories to allow.
